tweets.text:
"He was a speedy guy, but he was stopped. They had many levels in front of him before he would even come close... I can only say that I know a lot of those people in the Secret Service, and they were good," says @POTUS.

"When you have a thousand rooms sitting on top of a ballroom, and you have the elevators coming down right near the entrance, it’s a pretty tough situation. Now, right outside, we have something that’s on time, on budget... and that’s built at the highest standards of security."
tweets.text_resolved:
